title: Proverbs 8: Wisdom Was Before Creation
description: Personified Wisdom speaks: she was present before creation, delighting in the works of God.
introduction: Personified Wisdom speaks: she was present before creation, delighting in the works of God.

translation.original_text: Κύριος ἔκτισέν με ἀρχὴν ὁδῶν αὐτοῦ εἰς ἔργα αὐτοῦ· πρὸ τοῦ αἰῶνος ἐθεμελίωσέν μέ ἐν ἀρχῇ.
translation.text: The Lord created me as the beginning of his ways for his works; before the age he established me, in the beginning.

translation.original_text: ἤμην παρ᾿ αὐτῷ ἁρμόζουσα... εὐφραινομένη ἐν οἰκουμένῃ γῆς.
translation.text: I was beside him as a craftsman... rejoicing in the inhabited world.
